title: Senior Doctor - Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group:
Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group!
